basics.name: Hari Prasad Piridi
basics.label: Director, Data Science
basics.summary: Dynamic, innovative, and results-driven Director of Data Science with ~20 years of experience. Currently leading the Applied AI Team at Walmart GlobalTech. Prior to Walmart, worked with Microsoft India R&D for ~14 years. Research Scholar at BITS Pilani with expertise in Generative AI, Large Language Models, Graph Neural Networks, and Recommender Systems.

work.name: Walmart GlobalTech
work.summary: Leading and building multiple data science teams in the Catalog - Applied AI Team.
highlights: Providing technical roadmap and leadership to a team of data scientists and engineers
Advising leadership team on AI Strategy, roadmap and enterprise-wide deployment
Work cross-functionally with Search, Personalization and UGC organizations
Led GenAI Review Summarization showcased at CES
Led Visual Attribute Extraction and Part Segmentation with Grounding
Led Unified Badging Service for personalized badge selection and page-level optimization
Led SCAR — Session and Category Aware Recommendation with Graph Neural Networks

work.name: Microsoft India R&D
work.summary: Led multiple work streams across Cloud Supply Chain Planning and Data Science.
highlights: Led Automated Quota Management (AQM), Offer Restriction Effect (OFE) and Cloud Demand Forecasting
Led, hired, managed and mentored a team of applied ML scientists and data engineers
Set direction and vision for Data Science team to solve key data-led business problems
Designed and architected solutions using Big Data and Data Science stack
Collaborated cross-functionally with Microsoft Research and Partner organizations

work.name: Merrill Lynch
work.summary: Individual contributor responsible for development of .NET based web applications.

work.name: Infosys Technologies
work.summary: Individual contributor responsible for development of Java based web applications.

education.institution: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani
education.area: Spatio-Temporal Graph Representation Learning using GNNs and LLMs
highlights: Dynamic Graph Neural Networks and Large Language Models

education.institution: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani

publications.name: DVAE-GNN: A Dual Variational Autoencoder Graph Neural Network for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Static Attributed Networks
publications.summary: A novel framework leveraging variational autoencoders and graph neural networks for unsupervised anomaly detection in static attributed networks.

publications.name: A Causal Inference Framework for Personalized Badge Selection at Walmart
publications.summary: A causal inference framework addressing the multi-badge selection problem for E-Commerce product badges at Walmart.

publications.name: SCAR: Session and Category Aware Recommendation with Graph Neural Networks at Walmart
publications.summary: Session and category aware next purchase recommendation using graph neural networks for e-commerce.

publications.name: AI-based Market Intelligence Systems for Farmer Collectives: A Case Study from India
publications.publisher: ACM Journal on Computing and Sustainable Societies
publications.summary: AI-based market intelligence systems designed to support farmer collectives in India.
